title: CDIF Data Structure metadata profile
description: CDIF Data Structure profile. Extends the Data Description profile with full DDI-CDI structural complexity: composing cdifDataStructure (DataStructure + Dimensional/Long/Wide variants), cdifDataStructureComponent (component subclasses), cdifRepresentedVariable, and cdifValueDomain. Distributions are expected to carry cdi:isStructuredBy pointing at a Data Structure node.
